title: CapabilityManifest
description: Protocol-owned capability manifest family for run- and stage-scoped opt-ins. The scope is explicit so manifests never rely on implicit security-sensitive defaults.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for run or stage capability manifests.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this capability manifest.

manifest_scope.description: Scope of capability opt-ins covered by this manifest.

approval_profile.description: Approval profile selected as a signed manifest input for this capability manifest.

capability_opt_ins.description: Explicit capability opt-ins enabled for the run or stage scope.

items.description: Stable capability identifier explicitly enabled by the manifest.

allowlist_refs.description: Digest references to allowlist artifacts bound into the manifest signature input.

items.description: Digest reference to an allowlist artifact consumed by this manifest.

signatures.description: Detached signatures attesting to the exact capability manifest contents.

items.description: Detached signature block for the manifest payload.
